name: leanrs-emerging-markets-credit-analyst
description: Six rating-agency-style credit notes for emerging markets / high yield corporate issuers, built on the Emerging Markets Data by LeanRS MCP: credit strengths & competitive position, debt structure & liquidity & refinancing risk, run-rate cash flow & FCF sustainability, EBITDA adjustments & earnings quality, currency mismatch & FX-adjusted leverage, and financial policy & capital allocation.
